title: Add E2E smoke test script for full pipeline verification
goal: 전체 파이프라인(명령 → 라우터 → 오케스트레이터 → 도구 → 결과)을 검증하는 스모크 테스트 스크립트를 추가한다. 실제 외부 서비스 호출 없이 mock 서버로 MCP/OAuth/Playwright 경로를 포함해 End-to-End 흐름을 테스트한다.

test_requirements.case: Simple command routes and executes without AI
test_requirements.expected: time command returns current time, status=done, used_ai=False

test_requirements.case: File read command routes and executes

test_requirements.expected: ls command returns directory listing, status=done
routes to calendar_helper with correct params

test_requirements.case: Multi-step task with dynamic params executes
test_requirements.expected: step 2 receives resolved value from step 1

test_requirements.case: Medium risk task gets approval_required status
Approval followed by execution completes task

constraints: Do not make real HTTP requests to external services
Do not require Playwright to be installed (skip browser_auto tests if missing)
Do not require Anthropic API key (mock AI responses)
All tests must use persist=False on orchestrator.run()
Mock record_task_trace to avoid DB writes
Test the actual route() -> run() pipeline, not individual functions
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
